name: Fairy Tail - Matchlille
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>妖精伝姫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>フェアリーテイル</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－マチリル
desc: If a Spellcaster monster with 1850 original ATK is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand or GY, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Spellcaster monsters. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Fairy Tail" Spell/Trap or "Fairy Tail Tales" from your Deck to your hand. You can pay 500 LP; make the name of 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls become "Fairy Prince". You can only use each effect of "Fairy Tail - Matchlille" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a Spellcaster monster with 1850 original ATK is on the field: You can Special Summon this card from your hand or GY, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Spellcaster monsters. If this card is Normal or Special Summoned: You can add 1 "Fairy Tail" Spell/Trap or "Fairy Tail Tales" from your Deck to your hand. You can pay 500 LP; make the name of 1 Effect Monster your opponent controls become "Fairy Prince". You can only use each effect of "Fairy Tail - Matchlille" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
